{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Nyala
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nyala]] is the town [[Yzara]] is from.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
